scripts.dev: concurrently -n "user,post,interaction,feed,notification,search,media,frontend" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,gray,red" "npm run dev -w services/user-service" "npm run dev -w services/post-service" "npm run dev -w services/interaction-service" "npm run dev -w services/feed-service" "npm run dev -w services/notification-service" "npm run dev -w services/search-service" "npm run dev -w services/media-service" "npm run dev -w frontend"
